name: EthSetTokenInt
title: EthSetTokenInt
syntax: long EthSetTokenInt( long packet, char protocolDesignatorl[], char tokenDesignator[], long value ); // form 1
description: The function sets the integer value of a token.
Form 2 with byte offset sets a part of the token data as integer.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: handle of a packet that has been created with EthInitPacket
